name: Sullivan Home Loans
description_short: Sullivan Home Loans is a mortgage lender offering purchase and refinance solutions with offices in Indianapolis, Southern Indiana, and Scottsdale. They emphasize personalized service and educational resources for homebuyers.
description_long:
Sullivan Home Loans operates as a residential mortgage lender serving customers across multiple states with physical locations in Indianapolis, Southern Indiana, and Scottsdale. The company positions itself as a customer-focused mortgage provider that guides borrowers through the home financing process from initial consultation to loan closing.

The company offers a range of mortgage products and services including home purchase loans, refinancing, and specialized programs such as VA loans for military members and active-duty service members. They market their ability to source competitive rates and closing costs through what they describe as analysis of "the best options on the market." Their website includes a detailed 13-step preapproval questionnaire that collects information about purchase goals, property type, down payment capacity, employment, income, credit profile, and military service eligibility.

Sullivan Home Loans distinguishes itself through an educational approach, maintaining a learning center with 27 published articles on home buying topics. Their stated process emphasizes goal analysis consultation, customized solution preparation, transparent presentation of options, and guided execution through document collection and closing. They offer free consultations and personalized quotes through their online platform.

The company operates through a standard mortgage origination model and discloses that "mortgage loans may be arranged through third party providers," indicating they may act as brokers rather than direct lenders in some cases. Their service area appears geographically limited to their three stated office locations. Beyond the preapproval tool and educational content, the website provides minimal details about specific loan products, rate structures, or competitive advantages that would differentiate them from other mortgage lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers VA loans with $0 down for eligible military members and active-duty service personnel
Provides free preapproval consultations and personalized quote requests through their website
Maintains educational learning center with 27 published articles on home buying topics
Accepts multiple property types including single-family homes, townhouses, condominiums, and multi-family properties
Serves both first-time homebuyers and experienced borrowers with refinance options
Offers service across multiple states with dedicated office locations in three regions
cons: Website discloses that loans may be arranged through third-party providers, suggesting they may not originate all loans directly
Service area appears limited to three specific geographic regions (Indianapolis, Southern Indiana, Scottsdale)
Website provides minimal transparency about specific loan products, interest rates, fees, or competitive rate information
No clear disclosure of licensing, credentials, or regulatory oversight details on the website
Lengthy 13-step preapproval process may deter customers seeking quick initial rate quotes
best_for: Military members and veterans seeking VA loans with minimal or no down payment requirements
First-time homebuyers in the Indianapolis, Southern Indiana, or Scottsdale regions seeking educational guidance
Homeowners in their service areas looking to refinance existing mortgages
Borrowers across multiple property types who prefer working with a local mortgage company offering personalized consultation
diagnosis: Sullivan Home Loans is best suited for military-connected borrowers or homebuyers in their three geographic service areas who value personalized, consultation-driven mortgage origination and educational resources. Primary caveats include limited geographic service area, unclear direct lending capacity given third-party provider arrangements, and minimal transparency regarding competitive rates and specific loan product details on their website.
services: VA loans for military members and active-duty service personnel
Free preapproval consultations and needs assessment
Document collection and loan closing coordination
Educational resources and home buying guidance through learning center
Support for primary residences, vacation properties, and investment properties
Service to multiple property types including single-family, townhouses, condominiums, and multi-family
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
